since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.78%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.08% · BTC -4.87% · Gold -3.05% · Nasdaq100 -0.46%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.78%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.78%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -6.22%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +5.02%, WDAY +4.28%, ZBRA +4.00%, PUBM +3.82%, INTU +3.72%. Laggards: SMR -6.22%, INOD -5.39%, ORCL -4.96%, MDB -4.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.64% at $157.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
